\boxed{H}

Broccoli is typically the cheapest and most nutritious option per calorie, offering high fiber, vitamins (like C and K), and minerals at a low cost compared to processed or high-calorie foods. It provides substantial nutritional value without excessive empty calories, unlike options like chips, soda, or burgers. Fresh produce like broccoli is often more budget-friendly than animal-based or refined-carb foods when purchased in bulk.
